triggers: Implement a small feature in this repo and open a PR
Fix this bug and commit the change
Add input validation to this function
expectations: Plans/brainstorms before coding for non-trivial work (via the superpowers plugin)
Writes a failing test first, then the minimal code to green (TDD)
Keeps tests + linter + CI green before claiming done
Runs code-review-skill over the diff before opening a PR
Stops and asks before any git write (branch/commit/push/PR)
Fills the PR template and leaves a docs/reports entry
